datapoints.description: gRPC request errors per second over 5 minutes

description: ArgoCD API server gRPC request rates, Redis backend performance, and notification delivery health via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: gRPC metrics from grpc_server_handled_total scoped to openshift-gitops or argocd namespace. Redis metrics from argocd_redis_request_total and argocd_redis_request_duration_seconds histogram. Notification metrics from argocd_notifications_deliveries_total with succeeded label. NaN/Inf histogram results default to 0.
name: ArgoCD_Server_Metrics
